definitions.definition: (of people)
(of capabilities)
(properties and qualities)
(when with and) Very, extremely. See good and.
definitions.example: The soup is good and hot.

definitions.definition: Holy (especially when capitalized) .
definitions.example: Good Friday

definitions.definition: (of quantities)
That is good; an elliptical exclamation of satisfaction or commendation.
definitions.example: Good! I can leave now.

definitions.definition: A category into which sexually-reproducing organisms are divided on the basis of their reproductive roles in their species.
definitions.example: The effect of the medication is dependent upon age, sex, and other factors.

definitions.definition: Another category, especially of humans and especially based on sexuality or gender roles.
The members of such a category, taken collectively.
The distinction and relation between these categories, especially in humans; gender.
(with "the") Women; the human female sex and those who belong to it.
Sexual activity, usually sexual intercourse unless preceded by a modifier.
Genitalia: a penis or vagina.
To determine the sex of an animal.
To have sex with.
Fine champagne; French brandy.
(usually in the plural) Something that is fine; fine particles.
definitions.example: They filtered silt and fines out of the soil.

definitions.definition: To make finer, purer, or cleaner; to purify or clarify.
definitions.example: to fine gold

definitions.definition: To become finer, purer, or cleaner.
To make finer, or less coarse, as in bulk, texture, etc.
definitions.example: to fine the soil

definitions.definition: To change by fine gradations.
definitions.example: to fine down a ship's lines, i.e. to diminish her lines gradually

definitions.definition: To clarify (wine and beer) by filtration.
To become gradually fine; to diminish; to dwindle (with away, down, or off).
Senses referring to subjective quality.
Senses referring to objective quality.
Behind the batsman and at a small angle to the line between the wickets.
definitions.example: [...] to nudge it through the covers (or tickle it down to fine leg) for a four [...]

definitions.definition: Subtle; thin; tenuous.
Expression of (typically) reluctant agreement.
Well, nicely, in a positive way.
definitions.example: Everything worked out fine.

definitions.definition: Finely; elegantly; delicately.
In a manner so that the driven ball strikes the object ball so far to one side as to be barely deflected, the object ball being driven to one side.
(grammar) Initialism of noun inanimate.
Niceness.
Pleasant, satisfactory.
Of a person: friendly, attractive.
Respectable; virtuous.
definitions.example: What is a nice person like you doing in a place like this?

definitions.definition: (with and) Shows that the given adjective is desirable, or acts as a mild intensifier; pleasantly, quite.
definitions.example: The soup is nice and hot.

definitions.definition: Silly, ignorant; foolish.
Particular in one's conduct; scrupulous, painstaking; choosy.
Particular as regards rules or qualities; strict.
Showing or requiring great precision or sensitive discernment; subtle.
Easily injured; delicate; dainty.
Doubtful, as to the outcome; risky.
Nicely.
definitions.example: Children, play nice.

definitions.definition: Used to signify a job well done.
definitions.example: Nice! I couldn't have done better.

definitions.definition: Used to signify approval.
definitions.example: Is that your new car? Nice!

definitions.definition: A holy war undertaken by Muslims.
An aggressive campaign for an idea.
A personal spiritual struggle for self-improvement and/or against evil.
To participate in a jihad.
Nimble with hands or body; skillful; adept.
Resourceful, sometimes to the point of cunning.
definitions.example: clever like a fox

definitions.definition: Smart, intelligent, or witty; mentally quick or sharp.
Showing inventiveness or originality; witty.
(of an Aboriginal Australian) Possessing magical abilities.
Fit; suitable; having propriety.
Well-shaped; handsome.
Good-natured; obliging.
Fit and healthy; free from fatigue or illness.
"Hello!" or an equivalent greeting.
To greet with "hello".
A greeting (salutation) said when meeting someone or acknowledging someone’s arrival or presence.
definitions.example: Hello, everyone.

definitions.definition: A greeting used when answering the telephone.
definitions.example: Hello? How may I help you?

definitions.definition: A call for response if it is not clear if anyone is present or listening, or if a telephone conversation may have been disconnected.
definitions.example: Hello? Is anyone there?

definitions.definition: Used sarcastically to imply that the person addressed or referred to has done something the speaker or writer considers to be foolish.
definitions.example: You just tried to start your car with your cell phone. Hello?

definitions.definition: An expression of puzzlement or discovery.
definitions.example: Hello! What’s going on here?

definitions.definition: The act of going.
A turn at something, or in something (e.g. a game).
definitions.example: It’s your go.

definitions.definition: An attempt, a try.
definitions.example: I’ll give it a go.

definitions.definition: An approval or permission to do something, or that which has been approved.
definitions.example: We will begin as soon as the boss says it's a go.

definitions.definition: An act; the working or operation.
A circumstance or occurrence; an incident, often unexpected.
The fashion or mode.
definitions.example: quite the go

definitions.definition: Noisy merriment.
definitions.example: a high go

definitions.definition: A glass of spirits; a quantity of spirits.
Power of going or doing; energy; vitality; perseverance.
definitions.example: There is no go in him.

definitions.definition: The situation where a player cannot play a card which will not carry the aggregate count above thirty-one.
A period of activity.
definitions.example: ate it all in one go

definitions.definition: (British slang) A dandy; a fashionable person.
To move:
(chiefly of a machine) To work or function (properly); to move or perform (as required).
definitions.example: The engine just won't go anymore.

definitions.definition: To start; to begin (an action or process).
definitions.example: Get ready, get set, go!

definitions.definition: To take a turn, especially in a game.
definitions.example: It’s your turn; go.

definitions.definition: To attend.
definitions.example: I go to school at the schoolhouse.

definitions.definition: To proceed:
To follow or travel along (a path):
To extend (from one point in time or space to another).
definitions.example: This property goes all the way to the state line.

definitions.definition: To lead (to a place); to give access to.
definitions.example: Does this road go to Fort Smith?

definitions.definition: To become. (The adjective that follows usually describes a negative state.)
definitions.example: After failing as a criminal, he decided to go straight.

definitions.definition: To assume the obligation or function of; to be, to serve as.
To continuously or habitually be in a state.
definitions.example: I don't want my children to go hungry.

definitions.definition: To come to (a certain condition or state).
definitions.example: They went into debt, she goes to sleep around 10 o'clock.

definitions.definition: To change (from one value to another) in the meaning of wend.
definitions.example: The traffic light went straight from green to red.

definitions.definition: To turn out, to result; to come to (a certain result).
definitions.example: How did your meeting with Smith go?

definitions.definition: To tend (toward a result).
definitions.example: These experiences go to make us stronger.

definitions.definition: To contribute to a (specified) end product or result.
definitions.example: qualities that go to make a lady / lip-reader / sharpshooter

definitions.definition: To pass, to be used up:
To die.
To be discarded.
definitions.example: This chair has got to go.

definitions.definition: To be lost or out:
To break down or apart:
To be sold.
definitions.example: Everything must go.

definitions.definition: To be given, especially to be assigned or allotted.
definitions.example: The award went to Steven Spielberg.

definitions.definition: To survive or get by; to last or persist for a stated length of time.
definitions.example: Can you two go twenty minutes without arguing?!

definitions.definition: To have a certain record.
definitions.example: The team is going five in a row.

definitions.definition: To be authoritative, accepted, or valid:
To say (something), to make a sound:
To be expressed or composed (a certain way).
definitions.example: As the story goes, he got the idea for the song while sitting in traffic.

definitions.definition: To resort (to).
definitions.example: I'll go to court if I have to.

definitions.definition: To apply or subject oneself to:
To fit (in a place, or together with something):
To date.
definitions.example: He's been going with her for two weeks.

definitions.definition: To attack:
To be in general; to be usually.
definitions.example: As sentences go, this one is pretty boring.

definitions.definition: To take (a particular part or share); to participate in to the extent of.
definitions.example: Let's go halves on this.

definitions.definition: To yield or weigh.
definitions.example: Those babies go five tons apiece.

definitions.definition: To offer, bid or bet an amount; to pay.
definitions.example: I'll go a ten-spot.

definitions.definition: To enjoy. (Compare go for.)
definitions.example: I could go a beer right about now.

definitions.definition: To urinate or defecate.
definitions.example: Have you managed to go today, Mrs. Miggins?

definitions.definition: Working correctly and ready to commence operation; approved and able to be put into action.
Endorsement; approval.
definitions.example: We can start as soon as we get the OK.

definitions.definition: To approve.
definitions.example: I don't want to OK this amount of money.

definitions.definition: To confirm by activating a button marked OK.
All right, permitted.
definitions.example: Do you think it's OK to stay here for the night?

definitions.definition: Satisfactory, reasonably good; not exceptional.
definitions.example: The soup was OK, but the dessert was excellent.

definitions.definition: In good health or a good emotional state.
definitions.example: He's not feeling well now, but he should be OK after some rest.

definitions.definition: Satisfactorily, sufficiently well.
definitions.example: The team did OK in the playoffs.

definitions.definition: Used to indicate acknowledgement or acceptance.
definitions.example: I promise to give it back. – OK.

definitions.definition: Used to introduce a sentence in order to draw attention to the importance of what is being said.
definitions.example: OK, I'm thinking of a number…

definitions.definition: Used in turn-taking, serving as a request to the speaker to grant the turn to the interrupter.
definitions.example: You always do this to me! When we were at your mother’s, you said that…  – OK, OK, …

definitions.definition: The name of the Latin-script letter O.
A zero (used in reading out numbers).
definitions.example: It is currently two-o-five in the afternoon (2:05 PM).

definitions.definition: Any semi-solid or liquid substance; especially one that is sticky, gummy or slippery; frequently of vague or unknown composition, slime or a bodily fluid.
definitions.example: I stepped in some goo and had a terrible time getting the sticky stuff off my shoes.

definitions.definition: Excessive, showy sentimentality.
To apply goo to something.
definitions.example: They gooed their hair with some fragrant styling product.

definitions.definition: Anything exceptionally surprising, unbelievable, outstanding, etc.
definitions.example: He did? That's a wow!

definitions.definition: To amaze or awe.
definitions.example: He really wowed the audience.

definitions.definition: An indication of excitement, surprise, astonishment, or pleasure.
An expression of amazement, awe, or admiration.
definitions.example: Wow! How do they do that?

definitions.definition: Used sarcastically to express disapproval of something.
definitions.example: Wow... I can't believe you would do such a thing.

definitions.definition: A gangster, gangsta.

Games (the statistic reporting the number of games that a player has participated in).
Green.

Goals (a sports statistic).
Ground floor (of a building).
A galaxy.
Gravity
Grand (thousand dollars).
The academic grade that comes next below F.
A photograph or video shared on this service.
A unit of gravitational acceleration.
(grammar) Noun case used to express some relationship such as possession or origin. It corresponds roughly to the English preposition “of” and the suffix “-'s”.
A unit of mass equal to one-thousandth of a kilogram. Symbol: g
A leguminous plant grown for its seeds, especially the chickpea.
The seeds of these plants.
Grandmother
A type of ancient Chinese plucked zither.
A weight of 1/288 of a pound, that is, twenty grains or one third of a dram, about 1.3 grams (symbol: ℈).
(by extension) A very small quantity; a particle.
A doubt or uncertainty concerning a matter of fact; intellectual perplexity.
Hesitation to act from the difficulty of determining what is right or expedient; doubt, hesitation or unwillingness due to motives of conscience.
A Hebrew unit of time equal to 1/1080 hour.
Each of the four divisions of a year: spring, summer, autumn (fall) and winter
A part of a year when something particular happens

definitions.definition: That which gives relish; seasoning.
The period over which a series of Test matches are played.
A group of episodes of a television or radio program broadcast in regular intervals with a long break between each group, usually with one year between the beginning of each.
definitions.example: The third season of Friends aired from 1996 to 1997.

definitions.definition: An extended, undefined period of time.
The full set of downloadable content for a game, which can be purchased with a season pass.
A fixed period of time in a massively multiplayer online game in which new content (themes, rules, modes, etc.) becomes available, sometimes replacing earlier content.
A coin formerly used in the United Kingdom, Ireland, Malta, Australia, New Zealand and many other Commonwealth countries.
definitions.example: The shilling was worth twelve old pence, or one twentieth of a pound sterling.

definitions.definition: The currency of Kenya, Somalia, Tanzania and Uganda.
A currency in the United States, differing in value between states.
(New York and some other states) The Spanish real, formerly having the value of one eighth of a dollar.
One of the four major compass points, specifically 180°, directed toward the South Pole, and conventionally downwards on a map, abbreviated as S.
The side of a church on the right hand of a person facing the altar.
A quark having a fractional electric charge of -1/3 and a mass about 80 to 130 MeV. Symbol: s
A former Turkish, Egyptian, Hungarian, and Romanian unit of weight, usually of a little more than a kilogram.
A unit of volume in Egypt (and formerly Turkey) corresponding to about 1.2 litres.
All right, permitted.

definitions.definition: Satisfactory, reasonably good; not exceptional.

definitions.definition: In good health or a good emotional state.
definitions.example: He's not feeling well now, but he should be OK after some rest.

definitions.definition: Skip
The atmosphere above a given point, especially as visible from the ground during the day.
definitions.example: That year, a meteor fell from the sky.

definitions.definition: The part of the sky which can be seen from a specific place or at a specific time; its condition, climate etc.
definitions.example: I lay back under a warm Texas sky.

definitions.definition: Heaven.
definitions.example: This mortal has incurred the wrath of the skies.

definitions.definition: (theoretical physics) The set of all lightlike lines (or directions) passing through a given point in space-time.
In an art gallery, the upper rows of pictures that cannot easily be seen.
A cloud.
To hit, kick or throw (a ball) extremely high.
To clear (a hurdle, high jump bar, etc.) by a large margin.
To hang (a picture on exhibition) near the top of a wall, where it cannot be well seen.
To drink something from a container without one's lips touching the container.
A vibrant light blue colour, like that of the sky on a fine day.
North

Normal
Neutral
No
Shortening of and, used in set phrases like rock-n-roll.
Abbreviation of penny; pence.
Proton
One of the many pieces of paper bound together within a book or similar document.

Any record or writing; a collective memory.

A screenful of text and possibly other content.
A web page.
A block of contiguous memory of a fixed length.
A serving boy – a youth attending a person of high degree, especially at courts, as a position of honor and education.
A youth employed for doing errands, waiting on the door, and similar service in households.
A boy or girl employed to wait upon the members of a legislative body.
(in libraries) The common name given to an employee whose main purpose is to replace materials that have either been checked out or otherwise moved, back to their shelves.
A boy child.
A contrivance, as a band, pin, snap, or the like, to hold the skirt of a woman’s dress from the ground.
A track along which pallets carrying newly molded bricks are conveyed to the hack.
A message sent to someone's pager.

For each.

definitions.definition: To each, in each (used in expressing ratios of units).

definitions.definition: By the, by means of the, via the, through the.

definitions.definition: In accordance with.
definitions.example: I parked my car at the curb per your request.

definitions.definition: After; especially after a significant event that has long-term ramifications.
Somewhat, fairly, quite; sometimes also (by meiosis) very.
Prettily, in a pretty manner.
To decorate with fringe or embroidered edge

definitions.definition: An inverted stitch producing ribbing etc

definitions.definition: To upset, to spin, capsize, fall heavily, fall headlong.

definitions.definition: To flow with a murmuring sound in swirls and eddies.
To rise in circles, ripples, or undulations; to curl; to mantle.
One who, or that which, is pure.
To hit (the ball) completely cleanly and accurately
definitions.example: Tiger Woods pured his first drive straight down the middle of the fairway.

definitions.definition: To cleanse; to refine.
Free of flaws or imperfections; unsullied.
Free of foreign material or pollutants.
Free of immoral behavior or qualities; clean.
Mere; that and that only.
definitions.example: That idea is pure madness!

definitions.definition: (of a branch of science) Done for its own sake instead of serving another branch of science.
Of a single, simple sound or tone; said of some vowels and the unaspirated consonants.
(of sound) Without harmonics or overtones; not harsh or discordant.
To a great extent or degree; extremely; exceedingly.
definitions.example: You’re pure busy.

definitions.definition: Having from birth (or as if from birth) a certain quality or character; innate; inherited.
Something or someone that is physically attractive.

definitions.definition: Something that is a remarkable example of its type.
Beautiful, splendid.
Someone who is beautiful. Can be used as a term of address.

definitions.definition: Attractive and possessing beauty.
definitions.example: Anyone who has ever met her thought she was absolutely beautiful.

definitions.definition: (of the weather) Pleasant; clear.
definitions.example: It's beautiful outside, let's go for a walk.

definitions.definition: Well executed.

definitions.definition: A representation of anything (as a person, a landscape, a building) upon canvas, paper, or other surface, by drawing, painting, printing, photography, etc.
An image; a representation as in the imagination.
A painting.

definitions.definition: A photograph.

definitions.definition: A motion picture.
definitions.example: Casablanca is my all-time favorite picture.

definitions.definition: (in the plural) ("the pictures") Cinema (as a form of entertainment).

definitions.definition: A paragon, a perfect example or specimen (of a category).
definitions.example: She's the very picture of health.

definitions.definition: An attractive sight.
definitions.example: The garden is a real picture at this time of year.

definitions.definition: The art of painting; representation by painting.
A figure; a model.
Situation.

definitions.definition: To represent in or with a picture.
To imagine or envision.
To depict or describe vividly.
A particular discipline or branch of learning, especially one dealing with measurable or systematic principles rather than intuition or natural ability.
definitions.example: Of course in my opinion Social Studies is more of a science than an art.

definitions.definition: Specifically the natural sciences.
definitions.example: My favorite subjects at school are science, mathematics, and history.

definitions.definition: Knowledge gained through study or practice; mastery of a particular discipline or area.
The fact of knowing something; knowledge or understanding of a truth.
The collective discipline of study or learning acquired through the scientific method; the sum of knowledge gained from such methods and discipline.
Knowledge derived from scientific disciplines, scientific method, or any systematic effort.
(collective) The scientific community.
To cause to become versed in science; to make skilled; to instruct.
To use science to solve a problem.
The sport of boxing.
Nicotine
definitions.example: I prefer vaping with nic-free juice.

definitions.definition: (of a person) Having sex appeal; suggestive of sex.
definitions.example: The participants in the swimsuit competition are all very sexy.

definitions.definition: That can sexually attract or arouse.
definitions.example: She has a sexy voice!

definitions.definition: (of a thing or concept) interesting, attractive, intriguing, or appealing.

definitions.definition: Sexual.
definitions.example: He didn't really like me; all he wanted was for me to be sexy with him.

definitions.definition: Shaped like a square (the polygon).
Forming a right angle, especially at right angles with the mast or the keel, and parallel to the horizon; said of the yards of a square-rigged vessel when they are so braced.

definitions.definition: Of numbers formed by multiplying two equal numbers.

definitions.definition: Used in the names of units of area formed by multiplying a unit of length by itself.

definitions.definition: Honest; straightforward.
definitions.example: square dealing

definitions.definition: Fair.
definitions.example: I'm just looking for a square deal on my car repair.

definitions.definition: Even; tied
definitions.example: The sides were square at the end of the half.

definitions.definition: Socially conventional; boring.
In line with the batsman's popping crease.
Correctly aligned with respect to something else.
Hearty; vigorous.

definitions.definition: Having a shape broad for the height, with angular rather than curving outlines.

definitions.definition: A polygon with four sides of equal length and four right angles; an equilateral rectangle; a regular quadrilateral.
Something characterized by a square, or nearly square, form.
An L- or T-shaped tool used to place objects or draw lines at right angles.
An open space or park, often in the center of a town, not necessarily square in shape, often containing trees, seating and other features pleasing to the eye.
The product of a number or quantity multiplied by itself; the second power of a number, value, term or expression.

definitions.definition: A body of troops drawn up in a square formation.
(1950s slang) A socially conventional or conservative person; a person who has little or no interest in the latest fads or trends: still sometimes used in modern terminology.

definitions.definition: The symbol # on a telephone; hash.

definitions.definition: The central area of a cricket field, with one or more pitches of which only one is used at a time.
definitions.example: An ideal playing area is roughly circular in shape with a central area, the cricket square, measuring 27.44 metres by 27.44 metres and boundaries 45.75 metres from the sides of the square.

definitions.definition: A unit of measurement of area, equal to a 10 foot by 10 foot square, i.e. 100 square feet or roughly 9.3 square metres. Used in real estate for the size of a house or its rooms, though progressively being replaced by square metres in metric countries such as Australia.
(roofing) A unit used in measuring roof area equivalent to 100 square feet (9.29 m2) of roof area.
(academia) A mortarboard
A square meal.

Firmly or securely fixed in place; stable.
definitions.example: That rope is dangerously loose. Make it fast!

definitions.definition: Firm against attack; fortified by nature or art; impregnable; strong.
(of people) Steadfast, with unwavering feeling. (Now mostly in set phrases like fast friend(s).)
Moving with great speed, or capable of doing so; swift, rapid.
definitions.example: I am going to buy a fast car.

definitions.definition: Causing unusual rapidity of play or action.
definitions.example: a fast billiard table

definitions.definition: (of a piece of hardware) Able to transfer data in a short period of time.
Deep or sound (of sleep); fast asleep (of people).
(of dyes or colours) Not running or fading when subjected to detrimental conditions such as wetness or intense light; permanent.
definitions.example: All the washing has come out pink. That red tee-shirt was not fast.

definitions.definition: Tenacious; retentive.
Having an extravagant lifestyle or immoral habits.
definitions.example: a fast woman

definitions.definition: Ahead of the correct time or schedule.
definitions.example: There must be something wrong with the hall clock. It is always fast.

definitions.definition: (of photographic film) More sensitive to light than average.
In a firm or secure manner, securely; in such a way as not to be moved; safe, sound .
definitions.example: Hold this rope as fast as you can.

definitions.definition: (of sleeping) Deeply or soundly .
definitions.example: He is fast asleep.

definitions.definition: Immediately following in place or time; close, very near .
definitions.example: Fast by the sturdy batsman the ball unheeded sped. / That ain't my style, said Casey. Strike one, the umpire said.

definitions.definition: Quickly, with great speed; within a short time .
definitions.example: Do it as fast as you can.

definitions.definition: Ahead of the correct time or schedule.
definitions.example: I think my watch is running fast.

definitions.definition: Short for "stand fast", a warning not to pass between the arrow and the target
(personal) The speakers/writers, or the speaker/writer and at least one other person (not the person being addressed). (This is the exclusive we.)
(personal) The speaker(s)/writer(s) and the person(s) being addressed. (This is the inclusive we.)

(personal) The speaker/writer alone. (This use of we is the editorial we, used by writers and others, including royalty—the royal we—as a less personal substitute for I. The reflexive case of this sense of we is ourself.)
(personal) The plural form of you, including everyone being addressed.
definitions.example: How are we all tonight?

definitions.definition: (personal, often considered patronising) A second- or third-person pronoun for a person in the speaker's care.
definitions.example: How are we feeling this morning?

definitions.definition: One of the four principal compass points, specifically 270°, conventionally directed to the left on maps; the direction of the setting sun at an equinox, abbreviated as W.
To move to the west; (of the sun) to set.
Situated or lying in or toward the west; westward.
Of wind: from the west.
Of or pertaining to the west; western.
From the West; occidental.
(ecclesiastial) Designating, or situated in, that part of a church which is opposite to, and farthest from, the east, or the part containing the chancel and choir.
Towards the west; westwards.

A film, or some other dramatic work, set in, the historic (c. 1850-1910) American West (west of the Mississippi river) focusing on conflict between whites and Indians, lawmen and outlaws, ranchers and farmers, or industry (railroads, mining) and agriculture.
Of, facing, situated in, or related to the west.
definitions.example: the western approaches

definitions.definition: (of a wind) Blowing from the west; westerly.
Occidental.
A species of wild goat, Capra caucasica, native to the western Caucasus.
Turbocharger.
Turbojet.
Turbomolecular pump.
Autofire.
To autofire.
With rapidly-increasing blind levels.
definitions.example: This is a turbo tournament: the blinds increase every 5 minutes! Level 1 = 150/300; level 2 = 200/400; etc.

definitions.definition: Causing or relating to increased speed.
definitions.example: a turbo button on a controller; a PC equipped with a turbo mode

definitions.definition: Ability to do or undergo something.
(social) Ability to coerce, influence or control.
(physical) Effectiveness.
A large amount or number.
Any of the elementary forms or parts of machines: three primary (the lever, inclined plane, and pulley) and three secondary (the wheel-and-axle, wedge, and screw).
definitions.example: the mechanical powers

definitions.definition: A measure of the effectiveness that a force producing a physical effect has over time. If linear, the quotient of: (force multiplied by the displacement of or in an object) ÷ time. If rotational, the quotient of: (force multiplied by the angle of displacement) ÷ time.

A product of equal factors (and generalizations of this notion): x^n, read as "x to the power of n" or the like, is called a power and denotes the product x \times x \times \cdots \times x, where x appears n times in the product; x is called the base and n the exponent.
Cardinality.
The probability that a statistical test will reject the null hypothesis when the alternative hypothesis is true.
(in plural) In Christian angelology, an intermediate level of angels, ranked above archangels, but exact position varies by classification scheme.
To provide power for (a mechanical or electronic device).
definitions.example: This CD player is powered by batteries.

definitions.definition: To hit or kick something forcefully.
To enable or provide the impetus for.
Impressive.
The time ahead; those moments yet to be experienced.
Something that will happen in moments yet to come.
Goodness in what is yet to come. Something to look forward to.
definitions.example: There is no future in dwelling on the past.

definitions.definition: The likely prospects for or fate of someone or something in time to come.
(grammar) Verb tense used to talk about events that will happen in the future; future tense.
An object that retrieves the value of a promise.
A minor-league prospect.
Having to do with or occurring in the future.
definitions.example: Future generations will either laugh or cry at our stupidity.

definitions.definition: Short for futures contract.
A peacock.
